message:
style(sync): reformat validate_jsonl_fd_metadata directory-fd test to satisfy rustfmt

Pure whitespace / rustfmt adjustment in the test module of
`sync::path` — split the two long assertion lines into the
multi-line form rustfmt prefers. No logic change; the assertions
still check that a directory file descriptor fails metadata
validation and that the error message mentions "not a regular file".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
